Clinical
Specialties

Engineered for surgical excellence and uncompromising safety across every medical discipline.

Full Capability Catalog

Ancillary Surgical Disposables

Our ancillary range provides complete sterile protection for clinical equipment and surgical staff. From specialized C-Arm and Camera covers to fluid-resistant leggings and shoe covers, we ensure a 360-degree sterile environment.

Disposable Bed Sheets & Covering

Our disposable bed sheets and covering s...

Disposable Patient Gowns/Kits

Our patient gowns are lightweight, breathable, and provide excellent coverage. Available in various sleeve lengths and complete kits including bouffant caps, shoe covers, and patient towels.
